svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.title: Beads v1.1.0 System Diagram
svg.desc: A single-image SVG system diagram for Beads v1.1.0 showing actors, CLI surface, issue model and dependency graph, storage (Dolt and wisp tables), cross-machine sync via refs/dolt/data, and the advanced workflow lifecycle (formulas, protos, molecules, wisps, bonds, gates).
svg.text: Purpose & mental model · Actors · CLI · Engine · Stores · Find path · Workflow lifecycle · Sync · Ops · commit 8e4e59d39f3459a43cf21a3236a13eca4dd874f7

g.text: LAYER 2 · CLI SURFACE — Install, find, do (bd)
A single binary; one command group per verb. JSON output is the stable agent API. Install: brew install beads · npm i -g @beads/bd · bd init.
bd create · bd show · bd update
bd close · bd reopen · bd defer
bd ready · bd blocked · bd list
bd search · bd children · bd stale
bd dep add · bd dep remove · tree
bd cook · bd mol pour · bd mol wisp
bd mol bond · bd mol squash · bd mol burn
bd mol stale · bd wisp gc · bd promote
bd formula list · bd formula show
bd formula convert · bd mol distill
bd gate create · bd gate check
bd gate resolve · bd gate discover
bd prime · bd remember · bd setup
bd dolt pull · bd dolt push · bd vc
bd config · bd doctor · bd backup
Issue model · dependency graph · ready/blocked calculation · formula pipeline · gate resolver.
Dolt is the source of truth. Wisp tables are dolt_ignored — local only, never synced, never exported.
Auto-committed per write. Hash IDs enable cross-clone dedup.
Ephemeral=true · ID: bd-wisp-x7k · never pushed, never pulled
Promote (wisp → issue) is one Dolt transaction; IDs preserved.
From on-disk formula to live molecule or vapor wisp — via bonds and gates.
Atomic spawn+attach. Bond points: authoring only at v1.1.0.
bd gate check · bd gate add-waiter · bd ready --gated
Dolt rides refs/dolt/data on your git remote. Wisp state never leaves the machine.
bd dolt pull && bd dolt push
JSONL is passive, never the wire
GIT REMOTE (carries Beads data on a separate ref)
Wisp state: NOT stored on remote (local-only)
Dolt remotes (DoltHub, S3, GCS) work the same way.
bd dolt pull && bd dolt push
Config, doctor, backup, history compaction, migration recipe.
1. bd export --all + bd backup init && bd backup sync
2. Pick one clone to migrate (remote-migrate gate is on)
3. Other clones: bd bootstrap (or auto via refs/dolt/data)
4. bd doctor on every clone for schema skew
Migration 0052: 10–25 s pause on rigs > 10K issues
v53 repair covers wisp_dependencies split-column drift
Recovery gate lets already-failed DB self-heal on next open

svg.text: Sources: Beads v1.1.0 (gastownhall/beads, commit 8e4e59d3…) · Companion: minimax-cheatsheet.svg · minimax-guide.html · coverage.md
